positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a soaring mountain lynx silhouette, positioned centrally. The lynx is captured mid-leap, its form dynamic and powerful. The background is a deep gradient of twilight indigo blending into soft periwinkle blue, suggesting a distant mountain range at dawn. The style is highly graphic, using thick, crisp outlines and negative space effectively, reminiscent of Art Deco meets Pacific Northwest wildlife art. Use limited, earthy tones (deep emerald green, charcoal gray, burnt orange) for accenting the foreground elements and the ground. High contrast, clean vectors, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Perfect composition, centered, highly detailed texture in the fur and rock formations, clean edges.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, watermark, logo, text, graffiti, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, grainy, low contrast, photographic, realistic, jpeg artifacts
